description_long: This object is a cylindrical lotion container with a predominantly white body and black top and bottom sections. The front features a printed label with the brand 'ABL' and additional text, as well as a green leaf motif, giving it a clean and natural aesthetic. The sides of the container are decorated with blue bubble-like graphics, adding a touch of visual interest. The top of the container has a protruding black nozzle or spout, and there is a visible hook on the back, suggesting it can be hung for convenience. The overall design is sleek and modern, suitable for personal care use in urban environments. The container appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a likely hollow interior for holding lotion.
description: A sleek cylindrical lotion container with a white body, black ends, blue bubble graphics, and a front label reading 'ABL'. It features a nozzle and a hanging hook.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ABL' label, green leaf motif, and product information on the white body.
description_view_1: Side-back view highlighting the blue bubble graphics and the black hanging hook at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white body with scattered blue bubbles and the black nozzle on top.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the blue bubble graphics and the hanging hook, no visible label.
